user_query: I'm organizing a charity event and I need to print labels for the donation boxes. Can you provide me with a list of label shapes and sizes suitable for printing on A4 paper? Also, I want to generate an image of the event location to include on the labels. Finally, I need to fetch the user details for the volunteers who have signed up for the event.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of suitable label shapes and sizes for printing on A4 paper.
Generate an image of the event location to include on the labels.
Fetch the user details of the volunteers who have signed up for the event.
